message:
chore(beads): sync bead status updates and trim unused fuzz Cargo.lock entries

.beads/issues.jsonl records the latest local bead-status transitions:

- franken_networkx-01qd closed (MultiGraph/MultiDiGraph .adj
  MultiAdjacencyView parity — already yields AdjacencyView Mappings that
  reject mutation; verified in 6cbc810).
- franken_networkx-1fcq closed (filtered graph views now expose a real
  EdgeView object; _FilteredEdgeView class routes has_edge/adj through
  the filter — fixed in c1723e5).
- franken_networkx-4dzn closed (layout rescale_layout non-dict error
  parity gated).
- franken_networkx-1rvy closed (tournament is_reachable input parity
  frozen).
- franken_networkx-u4mx closed (connected_dominating_set disconnected
  guard landed).
- franken_networkx-r1lzx marked in_progress (native asyn_lpa_communities
  rolling out alongside the conformance matrix).

Alongside a large number of metadata-only refreshes (updated_at stamps,
row ordering) from the local `br sync --flush-only` export.

fuzz/Cargo.lock drops unreferenced autocfg and indoc entries that the
fuzz workspace no longer pulls in after the recent dependency trim; this
is a pure lockfile compaction with no Cargo.toml changes — re-running
`cargo update` under fuzz/ would produce the same delta.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
